description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a colorful gradient wallpaper and a pill-shaped cutout at the top for the front-facing camera and sensors. The back is a solid black surface with a glossy finish, displaying a prominent silver Apple logo in the center. Two camera lenses and a flash are arranged in the top left corner of the back, slightly raised from the surface. The sides are thin and black, with subtle button outlines visible on the left edge. The overall design is minimalist and premium, typical of recent Apple iPhone models.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large colorful display, dual rear cameras, and a glossy black back featuring a silver Apple logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large, colorful display with a pill-shaped cutout for the front camera and sensors.
description_view_1: Left edge view revealing the slim profile and subtle outlines of side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a glossy black surface, dual cameras with flash in the top left, and a centered silver Apple logo.
description_view_3: Right edge view highlighting the thinness of the device with no visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: Silver Apple logo centered on the back, glossy and reflective.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful gradient wallpaper with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are located in the top left corner on the back, arranged diagonally with a slight protrusion.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are subtly visible on the left edge, likely for volume and mute functions; no buttons are visible on the right edge or front.
